summary: Audience source with solid levels and a smoother high end, making it the preferred pick despite minor brittleness compared to other audience recordings.
review: The reviewer favors this audience (Aud) recording over the mk41 Bryant Miller pull, noting that its overall level balance is better and the high frequencies are less harsh. While they acknowledge some listeners might prefer the alternative source, they consider this version the best Aud source for the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on recording quality; positive remarks give a modest rating, but lack of musical commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good overall levels and smoother high end; less brittle than comparable audience source, no major defects reported.
